mnemonics.title: Remember Recursion Components
mnemonics.content: BRD: Base case, Recursive case, Divide the problem

mnemonics.title: Fibonacci Memoization
mnemonics.content: STORE: Store computed values to avoid recalculation

mnemonics.title: Tail Recursion
mnemonics.content: LAST: Last operation should be the recursive call

acronyms.usage: Two essential components of any recursive function
Compiler optimization converting tail recursion to iteration
Optimization technique combining recursion with memoization
How the call stack operates during recursion

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a stack of plates: each recursive call adds a plate (frame), and when base case is reached, plates are removed one by one
Draw an upside-down tree: root is initial call, branches are recursive calls, leaves are base cases
Fold paper in half repeatedly - each recursive call narrows the search range by half
Imagine falling dominoes: each call knocks down the next, stopping when you hit the ground (base case)

analogies.analogy: Like looking into two mirrors facing each other - the reflection keeps calling itself deeper
The exit door in a maze - without it, you keep wandering forever
Too many plates stacked - eventually they topple over
A student keeping a cheat sheet of previously solved problems to avoid solving them again
